text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa gets injured during training, so I
bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
An injury like this is nothing to the world's
strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's no need for your concern! Your time is
better spent preparing for my inevitable return to
racing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: B-but Trainer! I said I'm all right!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You should head back to your offi—Ack! Ouchie.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... well...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I think I just got a little careless...
choice_data_list: True. You weren't fired up enough.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I think I just got a little careless...
choice_data_list: True. You weren't fired up enough.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No way! It's my fault!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm just weak... I'm... I'm...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Aaaugh! I want to get even stronger! I need to!
choice_data_list: Let's focus on healing up first.
Let's focus on healing up first.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Entiendo! Sorry for all the trouble!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some much needed rest, El Condor Pasa is
fully recovered and overflowing with
determination.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yes... reflection, introspection—soul-searching...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: My papa's gonna be so angry about this...
choice_data_list: Just be more careful from now on.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Got it! I'll be hella careful during training from
now on...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Not... fired up enough?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grrr! Me?! Not fired up?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Di que no es verdad! Say it ain't so! That's not me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm fired up, Trainer! You can count on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that declaration, she recovers from her
injury in a few days and performs better in
training than ever before.
